mapper.sql: id, scene_key, display_name, primary_provider_key, fallback_provider_keys, enabled, note, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM app_st_model_route ORDER BY enabled DESC, scene_key ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM app_st_model_route WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM app_st_model_route WHERE scene_key = #{sceneKey} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE app_st_model_route SET scene_key = #{sceneKey}, display_name = #{displayName}, primary_provider_key = #{primaryProviderKey}, fallback_provider_keys = #{fallbackProviderKeys}, enabled = #{enabled}, note = #{note}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM app_st_model_route WHERE primary_provider_key = #{providerKey} OR FIND_IN_SET(#{providerKey}, REPLACE(fallback_provider_keys, '|', ','))
